nasb.text: The rich man is wise in his own eyes, But the poor who has understanding sees through him.

esv.text: A rich man is wise in his own eyes, but a poor man who has understanding will find him out.

cnv.text: 財主自以為有智慧， 聰明的窮人卻能看透他。

ccb.text: 富人自以为有智慧， 却被明智的穷人看透。

csbs.text: 富有的人自以为有智慧， 但有悟性的贫弱者能看透他。
